zh.lifeSummary: 當Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona於1109年出生在西班牙安達盧希亞科爾多瓦蒙塔爾巴 德 科爾多瓦拉臘 德 洛斯 音法斯時，他的父親Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara27歲，母親Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba35歲。他於1153年之前與Ermesenda de Narbona結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1134年被列為alférez real。他去世於1164年7月9日在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈昆卡特享年55歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞桑塔 瑪麗亞 德 韋爾塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona于1109年出生在西班牙安達盧希亞科爾多瓦蒙塔爾巴 德 科爾多瓦拉臘 德 洛斯 音法斯时，他的父亲Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara27岁，母亲Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba35岁。他于1153年之前与Ermesenda de Narbona结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1134年被列为alférez real。他去世于1164年7月9日在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈昆卡特享年55岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞桑塔 瑪麗亞 德 韋爾塔。

nameMeanings.name: Pérez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Ramon, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish (Pérez): patronymic from the personal name Pedro, an equivalent of Peter . This surname is also found in France. Compare De Perez .
Breton (Pérez): variant of Pérès (see Peres ).

variants.name: Parez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Pérez (see Perez ).
Czech (Pařez): nickname from pařez ‘(tree) stump’.
In some cases possibly also French (Nord), Walloon, and Flemish: variant of Paré (see Pare ) or Paret .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Carlos, Jorge, Luis, Pedro, Jesus, Roberto, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Lara de los Infantes in Burgos province. Compare   De Lara  .

variants.name: De Lara
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Jose, Luis, Mauricio, Pedro, Alfonso, Ana, Jaime, Javier, Jorge, Merlinda.
Spanish: variant, with the preposition de ‘from’, of Lara .

nameMeanings.name: Manrique
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Luis, Juan, Jose, Fernando, Manuel, Jesus, Jorge, Mario, Raul, Roberto, Ruben.
Spanish: possibly from the Occitan personal name Aimeric (insouthern France), composed of the ancient Germanic elements haim‘homeland, village’ + rīc ‘power’.

variants.name: Manriquez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Roberto, Ruben, Jesus, Carlos, Rafael, Sergio, Armando, Felipe, Juan, Manuel, Alberto.
Spanish (Manríquez): patronymic from Manrique .

en.lifeSummary: When Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona was born in 1109, in Lara de los Infantes, Montalbán de Córdoba, Córdoba, Andalusia, Spain, his father, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, was 27 and his mother, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, was 35. He married Ermesenda de Narbona before 1153. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1134, his occupation is listed as alférez real. He died on 9 July 1164, in Huete, Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, at the age of 55, and was buried in Santa María de Huerta, Soria, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona est né en 1109, à Lara de los Infantes, Montalbán de Córdoba, Córdoba, Andalucía, Espagne, son père, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Ermesenda de Narbona avant 1153. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1134, sa profession de son indiquée est alférez real. Il est décédé le 9 juillet 1164, à Huete, Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Santa María de Huerta, Soria, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona 1109 in Lara de los Infantes, Montalbán de Córdoba, Córdoba, Andalucía, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara 27 und seine Mutter Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba 35. Er hat vor 1153 Ermesenda de Narbona geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1134 ist sein Beruf als alférez real aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. Juli 1164 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Huete, Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien und wurde in Santa María de Huerta, Soria, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona è nato il nel 1109 nel Lara de los Infantes, Montalbán de Córdoba, Córdoba, Andalucía, Spagna, il suo padre, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Ermesenda de Narbona prima del 1153. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1134, la sua occupazione è indicata come alférez real. Morì il 9 luglio 1164, nel Huete, Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Santa María de Huerta, Soria, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ko.Santa María de Huerta, Soria, Castilla y: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 소리아 산타 마i아 데 후르타
ko.lifeSummary: Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona(이)가 1109년 스페인 앤다루ci아 co르도바 몽알브a 데 co르도바 라라 데 로스 인팡츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1153년 이전 Ermesenda de Narbona(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1134년, 그의 직업은 alférez real이었다. 그는 1164년 7월 9일 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 c카 후트에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 소리아 산타 마i아 데 후르타에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona nasceu em 1109, em Lara de los Infantes, Montalbán de Córdoba, Córdoba, Andaluzia, Espanha, seu pai, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermesenda de Narbona antes 1153. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1134, sua profissão aparece como alférez real. Ele faleceu em 9 de julho de 1164, em Huete, Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Santa María de Huerta, Soria, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona родился в 1109 г. в местности лара де лос инфантесь, монталбaн де кoрдоба, кoрдоба, андалукiа, Испания, его отцу по имени Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermesenda de Narbona перед 1153 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1134 году он работал по профессии alférez real. Он умер 9 июля 1164 г. в местности хует, куенка, кастилла-ла манча, Испания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности санта марiа де хуирта, соря, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Manrique Pérez de Lara Conde de Narbona nació en 1109, en Lara de los Infantes, Montalbán de Córdoba, Córdoba, Andalucía, España, su papá, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Ermesenda de Narbona antes de 1153. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1134, su ocupación registrada era alférez real. Murió el 9 de julio de 1164, en Huete, Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, España, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Santa María de Huerta, Soria, Castilla y León, España.
